name: Cloudflare Platform
description: Cloudflare Workers, KV, R2, D1, Pages, DNS via Cloudflare's official MCP

env_vars.description: Cloudflare API Token with required permissions
env_vars.how_to_set: dash.cloudflare.com → My Profile → API Tokens → Create Token
dash.cloudflare.com → right sidebar when viewing any zone

tools.name: list_zones
tools.description: List all DNS zones (domains) in the Cloudflare account with status and nameserver details

status.description: Filter by zone status: active, pending, initializing, moved, deleted

tools.name: purge_cache
tools.description: Purge cached files from Cloudflare's edge for a specific zone by URLs or purge everything

zone_id.description: The Cloudflare zone ID to purge cache for

files.description: List of specific URLs to purge; omit to purge everything

tools.name: get_analytics
tools.description: Retrieve traffic analytics for a Cloudflare zone including requests, bandwidth, and threats

zone_id.description: The Cloudflare zone ID to fetch analytics for

since.description: Start of time range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z)

until.description: End of time range in ISO 8601 format

tools.name: list_workers
tools.description: List all Cloudflare Workers scripts deployed in the account with their metadata

tools.name: update_dns_record
tools.description: Create or update a DNS record (A, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.) for a Cloudflare zone

zone_id.description: The Cloudflare zone ID where the DNS record lives

record_id.description: ID of an existing DNS record to update; omit to create a new record

type.description: DNS record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV, NS

content.description: The DNS record value (e.g. IP address or target hostname)

ttl.description: Time to live in seconds (1 = automatic)
